summary: Committed the Cursor backend fix on claude/tender-darwin as 78b38e296b32f0a187879ab17cc2fa1bcaba7256 and pushed it to origin. Only src/control_tower/backends.py and tests/test_bootstrap.py were included; unrelated runtime drift, out.json, and src/control_tower.egg-info remain uncommitted.
